posts.snippet: WATCH: FPV footage of the moment a Russian Ka-52 was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, and eliminated the crew after a crash landing. Additional drones struck during the evacuation attempt.
posts.snippet_en: WATCH: FPV footage of the moment a Russian Ka-52 was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, and eliminated the crew after a crash landing. Additional drones struck during the evacuation attempt.

posts.snippet: The Ukrainian 59th Brigade destroyed a Russian Ka-52 attack helicopter on the Pokrovsk axis using an FPV drone, marking a rare kill of a helicopter by using this type of drone.
posts.snippet_en: The Ukrainian 59th Brigade destroyed a Russian Ka-52 attack helicopter on the Pokrovsk axis using an FPV drone, marking a rare kill of a helicopter by using this type of drone.

posts.snippet: Чи перейде противник на цифрові системи передачі відео для FPV? На мою думку — ні. І головне тут не ціна. В аналоговому режимі у оператора відеосигнал може зникати, шуміти, мигати, але будь-якими засобами пілот доведе дрон до цiлi. У цифровому режимі зображення ідеально чітке, а потім — синій екран. Але цифрові технології вже застосовуються для зенітних дронів, і їх там буде дедалі більше. Тому що
posts.snippet_en: Will the enemy switch to digital video transmission systems for FPV drones? In my opinion — no. The main issue here isn’t the cost. In analog mode, the video signal may disappear, get noisy, or flicker, but the pilot can still guide the drone to the target by any means. In digital mode, the image is perfectly clear, and then — a blue screen. However, digital technologies are already being used for anti-drone systems, and their use will only increase. Because

posts.snippet: Reports say a Russian Ka-52 helicopter was likely downed by a 59th Brigade FPV drone on the Pokrovsk front. Awaiting confirmation.

posts.snippet: Zelensky awarded the Order of Courage, 2nd class, to the troops who downed a Russian Ka-52 with an FPV drone.
posts.snippet_en: Zelensky awarded the Order of Courage, 2nd class, to the troops who downed a Russian Ka-52 with an FPV drone.
